definition.name: Whitelabel branding (example)
definition.description: Copy-paste starter for a whitelabel fork. Disabled by default.
definition.longDescription: Template extension for forks that want to rebrand the app. Copy this folder, rename it, edit index.ts with your brand values, drop your logo into assets/, and enable it in extensions.config.json. See docs/WHITELABEL.md for the full fork checklist.
